body_transformation: The rounded pink fur transforms into sleek, electric-blue fur with vibrant yellow streaks tracing the contours of the body, while the fluffy texture gives way to a smooth, static-charged sheen. Jagged lightning-bolt shaped spines emerge along the spine, sharp and angular against the streamlined silhouette. Glowing circuit-like patterns pulse faintly across the skin, replacing the soft pink hues with neon green accents. The curled tail tip now crackles with tiny sparks, maintaining its spiral shape but radiating energy.
signature_feature: Tail tip: crystallized lightning core with neon green circuit patterns and sparking energy arcs.
